markdown:
#  How do I check what Procore tools are included with my Procore account? 
##  Background 
Procore offers multiple different products that include different tools within the platform. Therefore, you may see different tool offerings in your account depending on what product(s) your company has purchased.
##  Answer 
To check which Company Level tools you have, you can log into your Procore account and then expand the mega-menu. All Company Level tools available to you will be listed:
![Company Level Tools](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0f604e8c87d79fdea1c229e2e3388531/f11aac90eb75acf20e80f98b93a0529d/company-level-tools.png?fm=webp)
To check which Project Level tools you have, you can select a project in your Procore account and then expand the mega-menu. All Project Level tools available to you will be listed:
![Project Level Tools](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/7df7d6b8ac431ca3e79c1599a3258c87/a5d61620287a110b2b0622a4a0631ac5/project-level-tools.png?fm=webp)
#####  Note
You will only see the tools in the megamenu that you have permissions to access.
